feed.title: kingasix TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kingasix

entry.title: I can’t believe it was Ganon this whole time. I am befuddled… but apparently Midna has had enough with Zant’s BS. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I can’t believe it was Ganon this whole time. I am befuddled… but apparently Midna has had enough with Zant’s BS. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Decided to run around Hyrule and get some extra hearts wherever I could find them. Always fun when I come across one. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Decided to run around Hyrule and get some extra hearts wherever I could find them. Always fun when I come across one. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Traveling around Hyrule for some rupees when all of a sudden I am attacked by a murder of crows… But they gave me rupees so I guess you can say two birds, many rupees. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Traveling around Hyrule for some rupees when all of a sudden I am attacked by a murder of crows… But they gave me rupees so I guess you can say two birds, many rupees. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I know we should be on the way to take back Hyrule Castle but I had to go hit the slopes with my yeti and them. We some real snowboard kids frfr. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I know we should be on the way to take back Hyrule Castle but I had to go hit the slopes with my yeti and them. We some real snowboard kids frfr. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I wish my game audio was a bit louder because they are getting down at the Malo Mart. We was jiggin’ while I purchased my magic armor. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I wish my game audio was a bit louder because they are getting down at the Malo Mart. We was jiggin’ while I purchased my magic armor. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I think Midna might be a digimon the way she just transformed into this thingamajig. Link would be a digimon-destined. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: I think Midna might be a digimon the way she just transformed into this thingamajig. Link would be a digimon-destined. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Looks like King Bulblin wants to run the ones one last time and I must oblige. I’ll teach this old man this lesson as many times as he wants. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Looks like King Bulblin wants to run the ones one last time and I must oblige. I’ll teach this old man this lesson as many times as he wants. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: It took about three or four times but King Bulblin finally realized who’s the dude around Hyrule. He cool people though… He’ll be alright. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: It took about three or four times but King Bulblin finally realized who’s the dude around Hyrule. He cool people though… He’ll be alright. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: All jokes aside, its fun busting these Darknuts. I wish my hidden skills would come in handy more but that might be a skill issue. Still had a fun time. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: All jokes aside, its fun busting these Darknuts. I wish my hidden skills would come in handy more but that might be a skill issue. Still had a fun time. 🤷🏾‍♂️ #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Apologies for the lack of updates on Whole Fool & the Party Network. I’ve been making more time for it lately so hopefully you’ll be seeing more of it. Don’t be afraid to ask me anything about the project or myself. Thank you and have a foolishly jovial t
entry.content: Apologies for the lack of updates on Whole Fool & the Party Network. I’ve been making more time for it lately so hopefully you’ll be seeing more of it. Don’t be afraid to ask me anything about the project or myself. Thank you and have a foolishly jovial t

entry.title: We did not need to do a cutscene camera pan to these grunt lizards… Tryna hype them up n ish. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #retrogaming
entry.content: We did not need to do a cutscene camera pan to these grunt lizards… Tryna hype them up n ish. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #retrogaming

entry.title: Nintendo really wants me to bust two Darknuts back to back at the same time… And i just got finished busting a Darknut 😩 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Nintendo really wants me to bust two Darknuts back to back at the same time… And i just got finished busting a Darknut 😩 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Look like we got a Ganon infused Zelda on our hands. I don’t really like how his voice is coming out of the princess’s body… 🤨 #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming
entry.content: Look like we got a Ganon infused Zelda on our hands. I don’t really like how his voice is coming out of the princess’s body… 🤨 #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming

entry.title: So Im sitting here confused on why I can’t parry Zeldadorf and realize I had the Ordon Sword equipped. Im not sure when this even happened lol. 😅 #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming
entry.content: So Im sitting here confused on why I can’t parry Zeldadorf and realize I had the Ordon Sword equipped. Im not sure when this even happened lol. 😅 #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming

entry.title: Ganondorf though he could drop the “dorf” off and beat me in his piggy form but we all know wolf beats pig! #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming
entry.content: Ganondorf though he could drop the “dorf” off and beat me in his piggy form but we all know wolf beats pig! #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming

entry.title: Honestly, I just think Midna likes using those Fused Shadow but I appreciate her and her last stand against the Dorf! #asixverse #blerd #gaming #retrogaming #zelda
entry.content: Honestly, I just think Midna likes using those Fused Shadow but I appreciate her and her last stand against the Dorf! #asixverse #blerd #gaming #retrogaming #zelda

entry.title: After the comments I got about it, I had to run the footage back and I found where I equipped the Ordon sword. This was so smoothly foolish of me. 😅 #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: After the comments I got about it, I had to run the footage back and I found where I equipped the Ordon sword. This was so smoothly foolish of me. 😅 #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: Ganon had me in the first half but eventually Link and Zelda successfully ran Ganon off his horse and off the block! Some real Hyrule gang ish right here. 😤 #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: Ganon had me in the first half but eventually Link and Zelda successfully ran Ganon off his horse and off the block! Some real Hyrule gang ish right here. 😤 #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: This adventure has been full of fun trials and tribulations but we’ve finally ended Ganon and saved Hyrule! I very much enjoyed my experience with Twilight Princess and I appreciate the hands behind Dusklight! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: This adventure has been full of fun trials and tribulations but we’ve finally ended Ganon and saved Hyrule! I very much enjoyed my experience with Twilight Princess and I appreciate the hands behind Dusklight! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: Had a great time with Twilight Princess. I think its my 2nd favorite Zelda now… but who the hell is this and why Link acting like we know her?! If Midna was here I’m sure she could tell us… 🤔 Anyway our next game will be Mina the Hollower! #asixverse #ble
entry.content: Had a great time with Twilight Princess. I think its my 2nd favorite Zelda now… but who the hell is this and why Link acting like we know her?! If Midna was here I’m sure she could tell us… 🤔 Anyway our next game will be Mina the Hollower! #asixverse #ble

entry.title: Decided to try out that new Backyard Baseball demo and hit a few balls. Wasn’t expecting this game to comeback. #asixverse #blerd #gaming #baseball
entry.content: Decided to try out that new Backyard Baseball demo and hit a few balls. Wasn’t expecting this game to comeback. #asixverse #blerd #gaming #baseball

entry.title: I just wanted one more attempt but not that one lol. You can’t really tell but Wind Fortress is fairly easy to get through. #asixverse #blerd #gaming #retrogaming #indiegames
entry.content: I just wanted one more attempt but not that one lol. You can’t really tell but Wind Fortress is fairly easy to get through. #asixverse #blerd #gaming #retrogaming #indiegames

entry.title: Decided to play some Get to Work and rolled into my first interview. I need to actually try and beat this game but it gets pretty difficult lol. #asixverse #blerd #gaming #indiegames
entry.content: Decided to play some Get to Work and rolled into my first interview. I need to actually try and beat this game but it gets pretty difficult lol. #asixverse #blerd #gaming #indiegames

entry.title: Decided to play the Slayblade demo and I thought I was about to let it rip but it was I who was ripped on… 😭 #asixverse #blerd #gaming #beyblade #indiegames
entry.content: Decided to play the Slayblade demo and I thought I was about to let it rip but it was I who was ripped on… 😭 #asixverse #blerd #gaming #beyblade #indiegames

entry.title: I know I finish Twilight Princess and I had a blast but man do I miss the early days when Link would just casually toss rampaging goat creatures. #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming
entry.content: I know I finish Twilight Princess and I had a blast but man do I miss the early days when Link would just casually toss rampaging goat creatures. #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming

entry.title: Loaded up Schedule I so that I can pretend I got dope dreams and say a bunch of things I here in songs. Had to get that ish up off me before opps ran my pockets… #asixverse #blerd #gaming #indiegames #schedule1
entry.content: Loaded up Schedule I so that I can pretend I got dope dreams and say a bunch of things I here in songs. Had to get that ish up off me before opps ran my pockets… #asixverse #blerd #gaming #indiegames #schedule1

entry.title: Alright! We’ve finished Twilight Princess so what’s next on the agenda. I was gonna do Mina the Hollower but I changed my mind. Let me know in the comments what’s your pick! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: Alright! We’ve finished Twilight Princess so what’s next on the agenda. I was gonna do Mina the Hollower but I changed my mind. Let me know in the comments what’s your pick! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: I usually have to chase Misery all up and through this room but she has never played this nicely before. Shout out to RNGesus! #asixverse #blerd #gaming #indiegames #cavestory
entry.content: I usually have to chase Misery all up and through this room but she has never played this nicely before. Shout out to RNGesus! #asixverse #blerd #gaming #indiegames #cavestory

entry.title: The first time we all realized Link had that wolf in him. Good times… #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming
entry.content: The first time we all realized Link had that wolf in him. Good times… #asixverse #blerd #gaming #zelda #retrogaming

entry.title: Every now and again you’ll catch me streaming some gamedev and you may even catch me getting excited over fixing the most mundane things. #asixverse #blerd #gamedev #indiegames
entry.content: Every now and again you’ll catch me streaming some gamedev and you may even catch me getting excited over fixing the most mundane things. #asixverse #blerd #gamedev #indiegames

entry.title: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio
entry.content: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio

entry.title: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
entry.content: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights

entry.title: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
entry.content: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
